import io
import string

let input = io.read_to_end()
let parts = string.split_whitespace(input)

let a_str = match parts.get(0)
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  "0"
end

let b_str = match parts.get(1)
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  "0"
end

let s_str = match parts.get(2)
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  "1"
end

let a = match string.parse_int(a_str)
when Some(n)
  n
when None
  0
end

let b = match string.parse_int(b_str)
when Some(n)
  n
when None
  0
end

let s = match string.parse_int(s_str)
when Some(n)
  n
when None
  1
end

mut result = ""
mut current = a
mut first = true
while current < b
  if first
    result = "#{current}"
    first = false
  else
    result = "#{result} #{current}"
  end
  current = current + s
end
println(result)
